_publications._publicationTitle: NF1 deficiency drives metabolic reprogramming in ER+ breast cancer.

_contextSnippet: In the MCF7 cells, NF1 deficiency resulted in decreased expression of the neurofibromin 250 kDa isoform
details: NF1 deficiency in MCF7 cells resulted in decreased expression of the neurofibromin 250 kDa isoform
